---
title: "`r paste('Chikv | CellChat circle plots', switch(params$pair, A_C_vs_NC='Acute - Chronic vs Non-Chronic', '6m_C_vs_NC'='6 months - Chronic vs Non-Chronic', NC_A_vs_6m='Non-Chronic - Acute vs 6 months', C_A_vs_6m='Chronic - Acute vs 6 months'), c(all='unfiltered', pfilt='p-value filtered')[params$sfx], sep=' | ')`"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "07.P.compute_cellchat"
  input_rds: "so_w_cellchat.rds"
  this_step: "07.V.cellchat_results"
  pair: "A_C_vs_NC"
  sfx:  "pfilt"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
library(rmdreportdeck)
reportdeck_setup()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache=F)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))
input_var_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir))
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir))
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)

pair_map <- list(
  A_C_vs_NC    = c("A_NC",  "A_C"),
  `6m_C_vs_NC` = c("6m_NC", "6m_C"),
  NC_A_vs_6m   = c("A_NC",  "6m_NC"),
  C_A_vs_6m    = c("A_C",   "6m_C")
)
if (!params$pair %in% names(pair_map)) stop("Unknown pair: ", params$pair)
if (!params$sfx  %in% c("all", "pfilt")) stop("Unknown sfx: ", params$sfx)

conds  <- pair_map[[params$pair]]
nm1    <- conds[1]; nm2 <- conds[2]
sfx    <- params$sfx
thresh <- if (sfx == "pfilt") 0.05 else 1
pfx    <- paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx)

plots_outdir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/", params$pair, "/", sfx, "/plots/")
dir.create(plots_outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

report_href <- function(path) {
  file.path("..", "results", params$pair, sfx, "plots", path)
}

safe_asset_suffix <- function(x) {
  gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+", "_", x)
}

write_tsv <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  write.table(x, file = path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, na = "")
  invisible(path)
}

matrix_to_long <- function(m, value_name = "value") {
  out <- expand.grid(source = rownames(m), target = colnames(m), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  out[[value_name]] <- as.vector(m)
  out
}

pathway_matrix_df <- function(cc_obj, condition, pathway) {
  lr_names <- dimnames(cc_obj@net$prob)[[3]]
  pw_map <- cc_obj@LR$LRsig[lr_names, "pathway_name"]
  lr_idx <- which(pw_map == pathway)
  prob <- cc_obj@netP$prob[, , pathway, drop = TRUE]
  count <- if (length(lr_idx) == 0) prob * 0 else
    apply(cc_obj@net$prob[, , lr_idx, drop = FALSE] > 0, c(1, 2), sum)
  df <- matrix_to_long(prob, value_name = "communication_probability")
  df$lr_interaction_count <- as.vector(count)
  df$condition <- condition
  df$pathway <- pathway
  df[, c("condition", "pathway", "source", "target",
         "lr_interaction_count", "communication_probability")]
}

```

# Goal

Visualize CellChat ligand–receptor signaling as circle plots for a given condition pair and
filter setting. Each panel shows the aggregated communication network (by pathway) for one
condition, rendered as a chord diagram with cell types as nodes.

```{r load_so}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
cc <- so@misc$cc[[sfx]]
```

```{r circle_render, include=FALSE}
circle_items <- list()
for (nm in c(nm1, nm2)) {
  all_pathways <- cc[[nm]]@netP$pathways
  outdir       <- file.path(plots_outdir, "circle", nm)
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  for (pathway in all_pathways) {
    fstem        <- paste0(nm, ".", sfx, ".", gsub(" ", "_", pathway))
    png_filename <- paste0(fstem, "_circle.png")
    pdf_filename <- paste0(fstem, "_circle.pdf")
    tsv_filename <- paste0(fstem, "_circle.tsv")
    png_path     <- file.path(outdir, png_filename)
    pdf_path     <- file.path(outdir, pdf_filename)
    tsv_path     <- file.path(outdir, tsv_filename)

    png(png_path, width = 900, height = 900)
    netVisual_aggregate(cc[[nm]], signaling = pathway, layout = "circle", thresh = thresh)
    title(paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", pathway))
    invisible(dev.off())

    pdf(pdf_path, width = 9, height = 9)
    netVisual_aggregate(cc[[nm]], signaling = pathway, layout = "circle", thresh = thresh)
    title(paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", pathway))
    invisible(dev.off())

    write_tsv(pathway_matrix_df(cc[[nm]], nm, pathway), tsv_path)

    circle_items[[length(circle_items) + 1]] <- list(
      nm           = nm,
      label        = paste0(nm, ": ", pathway),
      suffix       = safe_asset_suffix(paste(nm, pathway, sep = ".")),
      png_href     = report_href(file.path("circle", nm, png_filename)),
      pdf_href     = report_href(file.path("circle", nm, pdf_filename)),
      tsv_href     = report_href(file.path("circle", nm, tsv_filename)),
      png_filename = png_filename,
      pdf_filename = pdf_filename,
      tsv_filename = tsv_filename
    )
  }
}
```

```{r circle_display, results='asis'}
fig_counter  <- 0L
items_by_nm  <- list()
nm_order     <- character(0)

for (item in circle_items) {
  fig_counter  <- fig_counter + 1L
  figure_id    <- paste0(fig_counter, ".", pfx)
  panel_title  <- paste0(item$label, " (Fig ", fig_counter, ")")

  panel <- report_item_panel(
    title     = panel_title,
    id        = paste0("circle-", item$suffix),
    asset_bar = report_asset_bar(
      report_figure_name(figure_id, suffix = item$suffix),
      report_download_link("Download PNG", item$png_filename, item$png_href),
      report_download_link("Download PDF", item$pdf_filename, item$pdf_href),
      report_download_link("Download TSV", item$tsv_filename, item$tsv_href)
    ),
    htmltools::HTML(paste0('<img src="', item$png_href, '" width="672" style="max-width:100%;" />'))
  )

  if (!item$nm %in% nm_order) {
    nm_order              <- c(nm_order, item$nm)
    items_by_nm[[item$nm]] <- list()
  }
  items_by_nm[[item$nm]][[length(items_by_nm[[item$nm]]) + 1L]] <- panel
}

for (nm in nm_order) {
  cat(paste0("\n\n# ", nm, "\n\n"))
  cat(as.character(report_loop_section(
    items_by_nm[[nm]],
    open_first = TRUE,
    max_open   = 1L,
    level      = 2L
  )))
}
```

# Session info

```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
